Where did the "Country Nation World Tour" concert artist go to college?

PREFIX  uom:  <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  ns:   <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT  ?artist ?artistLabel

question: Which location in the Anadyr Timezone has the biggest population?

         rdfs:label  ?label
    FILTER contains(lcase(?label), "anadyr")
    ?tz  ns:time.time_zone.locations_in_this_time_zone  ?loc
    OPTIONAL
      { ?loc  ns:topic_server.population_number  ?pop }
    OPTIONAL

  }

question: In what year did a team win the superbowl and the 2013 AFC Championship Game ?

    ?superbowl_event

              ns:time.event.end_date  ?sb_end_date

    FILTER contains(lcase(?afc_label), "afc championship")

              ns:time.event.end_date  ?afc_end_date

    FILTER ( ?year = ?afc_year )

question: What office did John Adams hold from May 10, 1775 before he was President?

              ns:government.government_position_held.from  ?start_date ;

question: What other years did the champion of the 1957 NBA Finals win the Championship?
sparql:
PREFIX  uom:  <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?year
WHERE
  { ns:m.0cs2n0  ns:sports.sports_championship_event.champion  ?championTeam .
    ?finalEvent  ns:sports.sports_championship_event.champion  ?championTeam ;
              ns:sports.sports_championship_event.season  ?season
    FILTER ( ?finalEvent != ns:m.0cs2n0 )
    OPTIONAL
      { ?season  ns:sports.sports_league_season.year  ?yearLiteral }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?season  rdfs:label  ?yearLabel }
    BIND(coalesce(?yearLiteral, ?yearLabel) AS ?year)
  }
ORDER BY ?year
